meaning: adj.为琐事而担忧的,过分装饰的,繁琐的,急躁,爱挑剔的,难取悦的,
examples: I've never been a fussy eater.
Our teacher is very fussy about punctuation.
She is not fussy about her food.
The cops tiptoed around me like I was a fussy baby taking an unexpected nap.
Most Virgos can be rather private and fussy about their work, or their personal workspace.
